codeReview.summary: The fix commit resolves all previously blocking scrutiny findings from fix-runner-core-loop and fix-canary-pipeline. Reviewer feedback is now propagated into implementer execution via task_prompt, canary mode now treats non-zero implementer/reviewer exits as fatal with stage-specific CanaryError components, run_canary preserves upstream CanaryError components, and eval parsing now consumes flattened erosion/verbosity/cost metrics from checkpoint_results.jsonl while avoiding double-counting against two_agent_metrics.json.

sharedStateObservations.observation: python-worker validator guidance still conflicts with mission-scoped validator rules, which can push workers toward full-repo checks that are out of scope for this mission.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/python-worker/SKILL.md:52-53 requires `uv run pytest -q` and `uv run ruff check .`, while mission AGENTS.md:40-41 scopes validators to tests/runner+tests/analysis and research/tests/.factory paths.

summary: Review result: pass. The rerun fix feature closes all blocking issues from both prior failed fix reviews, and no new blocking defects were identified in the reviewed commit and transcript skeleton.
